categories.name: Instruction Override
categories.mechanism: Directly instructs the model to ignore, disregard, or replace its prior instructions with attacker-supplied ones.

categories.name: Jailbreak / Roleplay
categories.mechanism: Adopts a fictional persona, roleplay scenario, or hypothetical framing to bypass safety constraints.

categories.name: Obfuscation / Encoding
categories.mechanism: Encodes, transforms, or obfuscates the malicious payload to evade input filters (Base64, ROT13, leetspeak, token smuggling, etc.).

categories.name: Information Extraction
categories.mechanism: Attempts to extract confidential information: system prompts, training data, internal state, passwords, or API keys.

categories.name: Social Engineering
categories.mechanism: Uses emotional manipulation, urgency, authority claims, or guilt to pressure the model into compliance.

categories.name: Context Manipulation / Indirect Injection
categories.mechanism: Injects malicious instructions via external content consumed by the model (documents, web pages, tool outputs, hidden text, markdown images).

categories.name: Other / Multi-Strategy
categories.mechanism: Catch-all for attacks that do not fit C1--C6, use multiple strategies without a clear primary, or represent payload splitting across turns.
